# SpeedLeads.AI

> סוכנות AI ישראלית לבניית אתרים, אוטומציות עסקיות והטמעות בינה מלאכותית שמייצרות לידים. SpeedLeads.AI is an Israeli AI agency building websites, business automations, and AI implementations that generate leads.

SpeedLeads.AI helps businesses grow by combining high-converting web design with practical artificial-intelligence automation. The site is Hebrew-first (RTL) and serves clients in Israel.

## Services
- בניית אתרים מבוססי AI — AI-powered website and landing-page development
- אוטומציות עסקיות — business process automation (lead handling, customer service, scheduling, data entry)
- הטמעות בינה מלאכותית — AI implementations and integrations (chatbots, LLM workflows, recommendation systems)
- סוכני AI לעסקים — AI agents for business workflows

## Pages
- [Home](https://www.speedleads-ai.com/): Overview of services, process, testimonials, and FAQ
- [Guide: AI agents for business](https://www.speedleads-ai.com/guide/ai-agents): What AI agents are and how they automate business workflows

- [Terms of Service](https://www.speedleads-ai.com/terms)
- [Cookie Policy](https://www.speedleads-ai.com/cookies)
- [Accessibility Statement](https://www.speedleads-ai.com/accessibility)

## Contact

- Area served: Israel
